# Paranjay Khachar

Software Engineer & Founder of Learning OSS. Focused on building robust, scalable AI systems and developer tools.

## Projects
- **Learning OSS**: A platform dedicated to open-source mastery.
- **Portfolio**: A minimal, pixel-perfect dev portfolio and component registry.

Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Agentic Workflows.
